summary: Soundboard recording with noticeable hiss but tight playing and great guitar tone.
review: The performance is praised for its tight playing and outstanding guitar tone despite a fair amount of hiss in the soundboard source. The recording captures the energy of the show, though the background noise prevents it from being pristine.

ai_rating.rationale: Review rates the show 4 stars, highlighting strong playing and tone while noting hiss; with only one review confidence is low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Noticeable hiss throughout; overall decent clarity but not pristine.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure; reviewer focused on overall tightness of the performance.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Great guitar tone noted by the reviewer.
